entities.description: A cereal crop targeted for improvement through allele mining

entities.name: SEQUENCING
entities.description: The process of determining the nucleic acid sequence in DNA

entities.name: AGRONOMIC TRAITS
entities.description: Characteristics of crops that are economically important for agriculture

entities.name: MOLECULAR BREEDING
entities.description: The use of molecular markers and biotechnology to improve crop varieties

entities.name: GENOME PLASTICITY
entities.description: The ability of a genome to change or adapt to different environments

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Environmental shifts that necessitate crop adaptation

entities.name: PRECISION BREEDING
entities.description: Targeted breeding tools used for specific genetic modifications

entities.name: PHENOMICS
entities.description: The systematic study of the physical and biochemical traits of organisms

entities.name: GENOMICS
entities.description: The study of the complete set of DNA within an organism

entities.name: ALLELE MINING
entities.description: A method for analyzing naturally occurring allelic variation or candidate genes affecting important traits

entities.name: ALLELIC VARIATION
entities.description: Differences in the DNA sequence among individuals of a species

entities.name: CANDIDATE GENES
entities.description: Genes that are hypothesized to be associated with a specific trait

entities.name: ALLELE-SPECIFIC MARKERS
entities.description: Markers that can distinguish between different alleles of a gene

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: A process where a marker is used for indirect selection of a trait

entities.name: ALLELE EVOLUTION
entities.description: The process of change in allele frequencies over time

entities.name: HAPLOTYPES
entities.description: A group of alleles in an organism that are inherited together from a single parent
